runners.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd over 390m at this track beaten 2 lengths (22.78) behind Moraine Trevor in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win on April 6. Solid chance with even luck.

runners.formComment: Hit the ground running last time with a fast early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by 1.5 lengths (22.48) over 390m at this track. Looks well placed and can measure up again.
